历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7299 → 7930 → 12985 → 9765. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant fluctuation, and in 2025 it rebounded to about 9765, showing large fluctuations in recent two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia Physics Category was 11 students from 2022 to 2025, and remains 11 in 2026, with a stable plan that has no significant impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In 2026, it ranked 157th in the main ranking of Chinese universities by Soft Science, up 11 places from 168th in 2025, reflecting continuous improvement in comprehensive strength. In recent years, its reputation has been stable with no major negative public opinion. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors enrolled in Ningxia Physics Category include Clinical Medicine (highly recommended hot), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended hot), Artificial Intelligence (cautiously wait-and-see), Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation (differentiated wait-and-see), and Business Administration (clearly advised against). Overall, engineering majors are relatively popular. The total number of examinees in Ningxia in 2026 is about 66,000, roughly the same as in 2025. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Ningxia, so cross-province study requires consideration of regional adaptation factors. The university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 2% (2025 data), which is a normal proportion for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation trend of historical rankings, stable enrollment plan, rising Soft Science ranking, and major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (competition slightly intensifies) based on the 2025 benchmark of 9765. The predicted minimum ranking is about 9735, with a range of 9235 to 10235.

For rankings near the upper limit (>10235), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2.
